scripts.demo: node src/cli.js sh -c "echo 'Module not found: Cannot find module axios' 1>&2; echo 'EACCES: permission denied' 1>&2"
scripts.demo_panel: node src/cli.js --panel --lang zh node -e "console.error('Module not found: Cannot find module axios'); setTimeout(()=>console.error('EACCES: permission denied'),300); setTimeout(()=>process.exit(0),1200)"
